SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF OMAR WAHIB IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYSSA FRIEDMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
